notes: If exists x A(x) (existential import, def:existential-q), then A = forall x (A->B) and E = forall x (A->not B) cannot both hold: a witness a gives B(a) and not B(a). The two forms and the existential-import hypothesis are all load-bearing and present. The proof also instantiates the universals (def:ui), a proof-level step not licensed by the statement, so flagged not added. Caps batch-0034.
